title: pi-council config
description: Configuration for pi-council — multi-model AI council

systemPrompt.description: Deprecated. Use per-profile systemPrompt instead. If present, applied to profiles that don't have their own.

models.description: Model definitions. Keys are model IDs, values are provider + model name.

provider.description: Provider ID (e.g. anthropic, openai-codex, google, xai, openrouter, deepseek)

profiles.description: Named profiles. Each profile defines which models to spawn and optional overrides.

models.description: Model IDs to spawn (must reference keys in the top-level models map)

systemPrompt.description: Custom system prompt for members in this profile. If omitted, the built-in default is used.

thinking.description: Thinking/reasoning level for all members in this profile

memberTimeoutMs.description: Kill members that exceed this timeout (milliseconds)

defaultProfile.description: Which profile to use when none is specified
